name: Banana Nut Bread Using Quick Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add mashed banana and beat well.
5. Stir in quick bread mix and chopped pecans.
6. Spoon batter into a greased 9 by 5 x 3 inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool completely in the pan.
